bead.title: runtime signals: record provider responses into ADR-012 cache
bead.description:
Review of fizeau-3e0f3737/fizeau-e6145528 found that internal/runtimesignals has RecordResponse/Collect/Write APIs but no production callers. Result: the runtime cache is never populated automatically, so the available-models snapshot cannot carry live quota/latency/status evidence.

In scope:
- internal/runtimesignals integration point(s) in provider/harness/service execution paths
- focused tests proving successful and failed provider calls update runtime signal state

Out of scope:
- Changing routing scoring to consume the snapshot; separate bead.
- CLI display changes; separate bead.
bead.acceptance:
1. rg -n "runtimesignals\.(RecordResponse|Collect|Write)" --glob "*.go" shows at least one non-test production call path.
2. go test ./internal/runtimesignals/... ./internal/serviceimpl/... ./internal/provider/... -run "Runtime|Signal|Quota|Latency" -count=1 passes with focused coverage that a provider response writes runtime status/latency/quota data.
3. go test ./... -count=1 passes.

governing.title: ADR-012: Per-Source On-Disk Cache for Discovery + Runtime Signals
